title: Enforce code-block output in PR message skill

comments.author: derek.norrbom
comments.text: Updating pr-message-writer skill to require fenced-code-block Markdown output by default, without requiring explicit user request.

comments.author: derek.norrbom
comments.text: Completed. Skill now mandates fenced-code-block Markdown output by default and only allows plain text on explicit user request. Regenerated agents/openai.yaml and validated skill.
